sections.heading: Data handling
paragraphs: This example site is primarily a static page with external links. Replace this placeholder with your real policy covering analytics, contact forms, third-party embeds, and hosting details.
If you use cookies, analytics, or email collection, explain what data is processed, why it is processed, and how users can contact you about their rights.

sections.heading: Third-party platforms
paragraphs: Most profile-link sites route visitors to external platforms such as LinkedIn, GitHub, Instagram, or YouTube.
Document those third-party destinations and link to their policies where appropriate.
